hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt

1 month ago  1.6k
A curated list of MQTT related stuff. ✨
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Mar 6th

Tools

  • MQTT TUIstars5 - Simple lightweight terminal based MQTT monitor and publisher.
  • MQTT-Tilesstars33 - MQTT-based IoT dashboard visualization tool. Allows easy dashboards sharing. Works with any MQTT broker supporting the WSS protocol.
  • VSMQTTstars1 - Simple MQTT client integrated in Visual Studio Code.

    • Telephony, PBX

  • sms2mqttstars2 - Docker Gateway to send/receive SMS through MQTT using an USB GSM dongle (gammu).

    • Misc

  • chrome2mqttstars14 - Python program to enable MQTT control endpoints for chromecasts (both audio and video).

    • Dec 28th, 2020

    Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • aqara2mqttstars4 - Attach Aqara Smart Hubs to MQTT.
  • [can2mqtt] (https://github.com/c3re/can2mqttstars25) - CAN-Bus - MQTT Bridge (also works vice versa).

    • Community Resources

  • MQTT community wiki.
    • ESP
  • mqtt-ir-transceiverstars132 - ESP8266 based bidirectional gateway between MQTT and IR. Use with PlatformIO.

    • Makers

  • deskmatestars42 - A hackable & portable MQTT-powered mini dashboard and control center.

    • Broker

  • Ably - MQTT broker service and protocol adapter

    • Tools

  • mqtt_recorderstars5 - Simple cli tool for recording and replaying MQTT messages.

    • Nov 14th, 2020

    Firmwares for ESP based Devices
  • OpenMQTTGatewaystars2.2k - MQTT gateway for ESP8266, ESP32, Sonoff RF Bridge or Arduino with bidirectional 433mhz/315mhz/868mhz, Infrared communications, BLE, beacons detection, mi flora, mi jia, LYWSD02, LYWSD03MMC, Mi Scale compatibility, SMS & LORA.

    • Community Resources

  • mqtt.org.

    • Talks

  • Einführung in MQTT - Dominik Obermaier & Jens Deters, Building IoT conference 2016 (German).
    • ESP
  • mqtt-with-micropython - Connect to MQTT with micropython and wipy/others (ESP32 inside)

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • homekit2mqttstars295 - Interface between HAP-NodeJSstars2.5k and MQTT. Control MQTT connected devices with Siri or HomeKit Apps.

    • Oct 25th, 2020

    Tools

  • mqtt-mirrorstars26 - Mirror MQTT traffic from one broker to another. Available as a CLI tool, helm chart or docker image.

    • Broker

  • Waterstream - MQTT broker leveraging Apache Kafka as its own storage and distribution engine.

    • Misc

  • MQTT Joystick Controllerstars5 - Open Source Android app that lets you control everything with your smartphone. Download it from Google Play.

    • Aug 23rd, 2020

    Misc

  • mqtt-transformerstars3 - A simple service which consumes, transforms and periodically republish json messages on MQTT.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • mqtt-prometheus-message-exporterstars12 - A small service which will convert mqtt messages to prometheus metrics.

    • Broker

  • KMQTTstars20 - Kotlin Multiplatform MQTT broker, both embeddable and standalone.

    • Logging

  • mqtt2graphitestars71 - Archived! Instead use mqttwarnstars842 with carbon plugin.

    • Jun 20th, 2020

    Misc

  • MQTT.Cool - A web gateway that optimizes any MQTT broker when sending real-time data to web clients with automatic throttling.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • MQTT.Cool Test Client - A web interface for testing interaction between MQTT.Cool and any MQTT broker.

    • Mar 6th, 2020

    Visualization, Dashboards

  • MQTT-Hyperdashstars5 - A universal independent MQTT Dashboard for linux/Raspberry Pi.

    • Broker

  • Aedesstars1.1k - Barebone MQTT broker that can run on any stream server, the node way.

    • Feb 6th, 2020

    Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • mqtt-unifi-protect-bridgestars15 - Adding motion-status from UniFi Protect Cameras to MQTT.

    • Jan 30th, 2020

    Cloud

  • Adafruit IO - Adafruit IO is the easiest way to connect your project to the internet. You can easily connect your project to Adafruit IO with your device-of-choice by using your programming language of choice (we have lots of libraries) and control or monitor over the internet. Data stored with Adafruit IO is yours to manage and control.

    • Clients

  • MiniMQTTstars19 - MQTT Client Library for CircuitPython

    • Misc

  • mqtt-camera-streamerstars83 - Stream images from a connected camera over MQTT & view using Streamlit

    • Jan 24th, 2020

    ESP
  • ESP32-BLE2MQTTstars326 - BLE to MQTT bridge, exposes BLE GATT characteristics as MQTT topics for bidirectional communication.
  • ESP8266MQTTMeshstars235 - MQTT over mesh WiFi integrated library for ESP8266
  • esp_mqttstars1.1k - MQTT client library for ESP8266.
  • nodemcu-gpiomqttstars9 - Lua script to connect ESP8266 GPIOs to MQTT.

    • Clients

  • mqtt.dartstars45 - Dart MQTT client.
  • rumqttstars199 - A fast, lock free pure Rust MQTT client.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • ipcam2mqttstars16 - A small FTP server to receive movement images from ipcameras and turn them into MQTT alerts.

    • Misc

  • AlexaMqttBridgestars81 - Bridge between Amazon Alexa and MQTT.
  • buderus2mqttstars13 - Bridge between Buderus KM200 internet gateway and MQTT.
  • kobold2mqttstars1 - Bridge between Vorwerk Kobold Vr200 internet gateway and MQTT.
  • leaf-python-mqttstars21 - Extract data from Nissan Leaf API and post to MQTT.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • mqtt2highchartsstars57 - Plotting live numbered data from a subscribed MQTT topic using Highcharts.

    • Security, Encryption

  • Teserakt E4 - End-to-end encryption and key management for MQTT and other M2M protocols – Open-source and paid plans.

    • Jan 13th, 2020

    Firmwares for ESP based Devices
  • ESPEasy - Turns ESP into a multifunction sensor device for HA solutions with web-based configuration.
  • ESPHome - builds ESP8266/ESP32 firmware from concise YAML descriptions, uploads to and manages flashed devices.
  • Espurnastars2.5k - HA firmware for ESP8266-based devices with rich web UI and ≈120 devices supported out of the box
  • Sonoff-Tasmotastars15.2k - Firmware for ESP8266 devices with web-based configuration. ≈500 devices supported (not only Sonoffs).
  • WiFi-IoT - ESP8266/ESP32 firmware builder. Partly in Russian. Free features are limited.

    • Broker

  • Mosquitto - "The" Open Source MQTT Broker.
    • Free test server hosted by the Eclipse Foundation.
    • Authorization Plugin in Gostars230 supports many types of logins.
    • Let's Encrypt Mosquitto Docker Container makes it easy to encrypt.

    • Dec 13th, 2019

    Tools

  • MQTT.fx - MQTT.fx is a MQTT Client written in Java based on Eclipse Paho. Supports scripting.
  • MQTTXstars978 - MQTTX is a cross-platform MQTT desktop client open sourced by EMQ, which supports macOS, Linux, and Windows.

    • Makers

  • Basecampstars251 - An Arduino library to ease the use of the ESP32 in IoT projects. See c't Magazin 2'2018 (German).

    • Logging

  • mqtt-firebase - A CLI tool for subscribing to MQTT topics and dumping them to a firebase firestore DB.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • Domoticz - Domoticz beta supports MQTT.

    • Smart Metering

  • bcontrol2mqttstars3 - Publish measurements from TQ Energy Manager / Busch-Jäger Energy Monitor to MQTT.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • Croutonstars273 - A dashboard that taps into your IOT network, using only MQTT and JSON.

    • Broker

  • EMQ Xstars7.8k - Scalable and Reliable Real-time MQTT Messaging Engine for IoT in 5G Era.

    • Misc

  • MQTT2ETCDstars2 - MQTT-ETCD gateway: PUT keys on ETCD through MQTT, and watch ETCD key changes on MQTT topics

    • Sep 25th, 2019

    Tools

  • MQTT CLIstars119 - A command line interface for connecting various MQTT clients supporting MQTT 5.0 and 3.1.1.
  • hivemq-mqtt-web-clientstars310 - Browser-based MQTT client that utilizes MQTT over websockets. Direct Link

    • Broker

  • HiveMQ - Java MQTT Broker that supports MQTT 3.1, 3.1.1 and 5.0. Commercial and open source editions available.

    • Clients

  • aiomqttstars47 - Async Python MQTT client based on paho-mqtt.
  • hivemq-mqtt-clientstars425 - High-performance Java MQTT client library with different API flavours for MQTT 5.0 and 3.1.1.

    • Aug 17th, 2019

    Clients

  • CocoaMQTTstars1.1k - MQTT for iOS and OS X written with Swift.
  • emqttcstars255 - Asynchronous Erlang MQTT Client.
  • TMQTTClientstars18 - MQTT Client Library for Delphi.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • control-freak - IDE for IoT & friends. Built in MQTT support.

    • Aug 13th, 2019

    Tools

  • SimpleMQTT - A Slack app to send messages from Slack to MQTT brokers with slash commands.

    • May 17th, 2019

    Clients

  • MQTTnetstars2.1k - MQTT client and broker implementations in .NET.

    • May 14th, 2019

    Monitoring

  • mqtt2notifysendstars5 - Subscribe to a topic and show notifications from MQTT messages on Ubuntu & other notify-send compatible Linux distros.

    • Logging

  • mqtt2mongodbstars10 - Subscribe to MQTT topics and insert into MongoDB.

    • May 7th, 2019

    Clients

  • gmqttstars206 - Python MQTT v5.0 client (asyncio-based).
  • luamqttstars71 - Pure-lua MQTT v3.1.1 and v5.0 client.
  • MIMIC MQTT Simulator - Simulate up to 100,000 MQTT clients per server for development/testing/deployment of IoT applications.

    • Platforms

  • mainflux - device management, data aggregation, data management, data analytics,connectivity and message routing and event management. Supported by Linux Software Foundation.

    • Apr 2nd, 2019

    Messaging

  • mqttwarnstars842 - Subscribe to MQTT topics (with wildcards) and notify pluggable services.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • d3-MQTT-Topic-Treestars89 - A MQTT Topic Tree viewer using the d3 collapsible tree and MQTT over websockets.

    • Apr 1st, 2019

    Broker

  • Moquettestars1.8k - Java MQTT lightweight broker.

    • Tools

  • mqtt-malariastars244 - scalability and load testing utilities for MQTT environments.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • Homegear has build in MQTT support.

    • Mar 23rd, 2019

    Misc

  • Valetudostars2.2k - Xiaomi (Roborock) Vacuum Robots Firmware with MQTT and Webinterface.

    • Mar 21st, 2019

    Tools

  • MQTT Explorer - Tool to visualize your MQTT topics in a topic hierarchy, a MQTT swiss-army knife.

    • Feb 25th, 2019

    Clients

  • mqtt-statsstars3 - Subscriber client to monitor MQTT Topic Statistics

    • Feb 22nd, 2019

    Tools

  • mqtt_treestars4 - Displays all Topics in an expandable tree, helps to get an overview if you have a lot of clients publishing. (python, tkinter)

    • Feb 9th, 2019

    Industry

  • spicierModbus2mqttstars25 - Modbus master which publishes register values via MQTT.

    • Jan 23rd, 2019

    Visualization, Dashboards

  • IoT OnOff - Configurable iOS/Android app.

    • Jan 22nd, 2019

    Industry

  • OPC Router - MQTT Gateway (publisher/subscriber) with various plug-ins (OPC UA Bridge, SQL Bridge, REST Bridge, SAP Bridge)

    • Jan 21st, 2019

    Broker

  • MyQttHub - Cloud MQTT broker.
  • SurgeMQ - High Performance MQTT Server and Client Libraries in Go.

    • Location tracking

  • OwnTracks - Location tracking and geofencing for MQTT.

    • Jan 12th, 2019

    Tools

  • IoT-Testware - The Eclipse IoT-Testware is a collection of conformance test suites for IoT protocols enriched with additional tools for fuzzing and performance testing.
  • MQTT Boardstars49 - Open-source diagnostic-oriented MQTT client tool.

    • Jan 9th, 2019

    Broker

  • hrottistars118 - A MQTT broker written in Go.

    • Tools

  • mqttclistars87 - MQTT Client for shell scripting.
  • MQTTInspectorstars67 - A general MQTT testing app for iOS (iPhone and iPad).
  • MQTTLens - A Google Chrome application, which connects to a MQTT broker and is able to subscribe and publish to MQTT topics.

    • Clients

  • Machine Headstars57 - A Clojure MQTT Client.
  • Moscapsulestars256 - MQTT Client for iOS written in Swift.
  • mqtt_cppstars223 - MQTT client for C++14 based on Boost.Asio.
  • mqtt_lua - MQTT Client library for the Lua language.
  • mqtt-clientstars14 - A Polymer Web Component that implements a MQTT client (uses Paho mqttws31.js).
  • MQTT.js - MQTT client for Node.js.
  • mqttstars713 - MQTT Clients, Servers and Load Testers in Go.
  • mqttexstars46 - MQTT implementation in Elixir.
  • MQTTKitstars455 - MQTT Objective-C client for iOS.

    • Operating System

  • mqttlauncherstars150 - Execute shell commands triggered by published MQTT messages.

    • Logging

  • mqttcollectstars19 - A collectd "Exec" plugin for MQTT.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • mqtt2homekitstars22 - Roughly the opposite of homekit2mqttstars295: Control your HomeKit-enabled devices with MQTT and without Siri or iPhone.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • Home.Pistars190 is based on MQTT.

    • Home Entertainment

  • kodi2mqttstars73 - Interface between a Kodi media center instance and MQTT.
  • MQTT-DashCast-Dockerstars3 - MQTT Docker to launch DashCast session on Chromecast.

    • Misc

  • bt-mqtt-gatewaystars368 - Easily extensible Bluetooth to MQTT gateway, currently supports: EQ3 smart thermostat, Xiaomi Mi Scale, Linak Desk, MySensors and Xiaomi Mi Flora plant sensor.
  • Tasker (Automation for Android) MQTT Publisher Plugin.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • node-red-dashboardstars943 - A dashboard UI for Node-RED.

    • Oct 25th, 2018

    Misc

  • snowboy2mqttstars5 - Publish MQTT Messages on Snowboy Hotword Detection.

    • Oct 14th, 2018

    Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • knx-mqtt-bridgestars18 - ridges KNX and MQTT using the knx.js library.

    • Oct 11th, 2018

    Industry

  • CODESYS-MQTTstars44 - A MQTT client for CODESYS PLC

    • Sep 18th, 2018

    Misc

  • gBridgestars153 - gBridge allows you to control (almost) any smart home device, any smart home software, with Google Assistant. Therefore, it transforms actions received from Google by voice commands to MQTT messages.

    • Sep 13th, 2018

    Broker

  • Mystiquestars17 - An extendable MQTT broker written in Go, with HTTP capabilities for observability. Implements MQTT v3.1.1.

    • Aug 21st, 2018

    Tools

  • mqtt-clientstars9 - A Simple MQTT Client command line (Python) (use paho lib)

    • Aug 16th, 2018

    Tools

  • MQTT-PWNstars166 - MQTT-PWN intends to be a one-stop-shop for IoT Broker penetration-testing and security assessment operations.

    • Jul 14th, 2018

    Lighting

  • sunricher-wifi-mqttstars13 - control Sunricher LED devices using MQTT.

    • Jul 1st, 2018

    Telephony, PBX

  • sip2mqttstars23 - A SIP monitoring script that publishes incoming calls with CallerID to MQTT.

    • May 25th, 2018

    Talks

  • An Introduction to MQTT: Why HTTP isn't the King of the Internet of Things - Shinji Kim, Robert Bird - Akamai, Samsung Developer Conference 2017.

    • May 21st, 2018

    Lighting

  • Arilux_AL-LC0Xstars194 - This is an alternative firmware for Arilux LED controllers which uses MQTT.
